# Aliveville

> Aliveville is an interactive AI world experiment — a persistent ecosystem exploring autonomous agent behavior, narrative emergence, and playable 3D exploration.

Marketing site at aliveville.com. Game client and simulation code live in the ai-game monorepo.

## Product

- [Home](https://aliveville.com/): Interactive landing and world preview
- [Privacy](https://aliveville.com/privacy): Privacy policy for this site
- [Terms](https://aliveville.com/terms): Terms of use

## Source

- [GitHub — ai-game](https://github.com/sarthak-fleet/ai-game): Monorepo (simulation, web3d client, astro landing)

## Optional

- [Foundry](https://sassmaker.com): Fleet showcase
- [Sarthak Agrawal](https://sarthakagrawal.dev): Builder portfolio
